ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_titles" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media title */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the media */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Merged genres associated with the media */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes (for series) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of release */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., Movie, TV) */,
  "production_house_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing production houses */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the media */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the media */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the media (out of 10) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the media in minutes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the media (e.g., completed, ongoing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the media */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_titles_production_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_house_id") REFERENCES production_houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "ltable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the left media title in the relationship */,
  "rtable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the right media title in the relationship */,
  "ltable_title" TEXT /* Title of the left media title */,
  "rtable_title" TEXT /* Title of the right media title */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Indicator of relationship significance (1 for significant, 0 otherwise) */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sequel, prequel, adaptation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_relationships_ltable_id FOREIGN KEY ("ltable_id") REFERENCES media_titles ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_relationships_rtable_id FOREIGN KEY ("rtable_id") REFERENCES media_titles ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_houses" (
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production house */,
  "house_name" TEXT /* Name of the production house */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production house */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the production house was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_genres" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing media titles */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing genres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewership_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewership pattern */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing media titles */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the viewership data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_patterns_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_titles ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production trend */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing production houses */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media produced */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of media produced */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of media produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_trends_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES production_houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "house1_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the first production house */,
  "house2_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the second production house */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the media title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_house1_id FOREIGN KEY ("house1_id") REFERENCES production_houses ("house_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_titles ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_house2_id FOREIGN KEY ("house2_id") REFERENCES production_houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
